description: The US Army Corps of Engineers requires a climatological precipitation assessment for autumn Mississippi River logistics planning. Using the briefing at ~/Desktop/waterway_logistics_brief.txt and the NCEP precipitation dataset (~/PanoplyData/prate.sfc.mon.ltm.nc), visualize the precipitation difference between May and September over the US Midwest and export the map to ~/Documents/MississippiLogistics/midwest_precip_deficit_may_sep.png. Additionally, create a plot for September precipitation and export it to ~/Documents/MississippiLogistics/midwest_precip_september.png. Complete the task by writing a logistics report to ~/Documents/MississippiLogistics/draft_restriction_report.txt based on the requirements specified in the briefing.
